high_concern_flags: prompt_input_correction: prompt stated Hawaii minimum wage '$14/hr from 1 Jan 2026' — VERIFIED actual 2026 floor is $16.00/hr per Haw. Rev. Stat. § 387-2 and Act 114, SLH 2022 trajectory ($10.10 → $12.00 Oct 2022 → $14.00 Jan 2024 → $16.00 Jan 2026 → $18.00 Jan 2028). Page uses verified $16.00 figure throughout.

prompt_input_correction: prompt stated tipped wage '$12.75/hr with $1.25 tip credit' — VERIFIED for 2026: cash wage $14.50 with maximum tip credit $1.50 (calibrated to the $16.00 minimum, with the $7-above-minimum employee earnings floor preserved from Haw. Rev. Stat. § 387-2(a)). Page uses verified figures throughout. Reviewer should re-confirm the cash-wage step against the December 2025 DLIR Wage Standards Division notice before promotion to indexable.

factual_uncertainty: 2026 cash wage of $14.50 and tip credit of $1.50 derived from the calibration mechanic in Haw. Rev. Stat. § 387-2(a) which steps the credit in lockstep with the minimum-wage step (credit was $1.25 against the $14.00 floor in 2024-2025). Confirm exact 2026 cash-wage figure against DLIR Wage Standards Division 2026 minimum-wage poster.

distinctive_hawaii_angle: steepest minimum-wage trajectory in the US toward $18 by 2028 + the partial tip credit with $7-above-minimum employee earnings floor. Both flagged as the page's differentiation against California (too complex) and Georgia (federal-default cleanliness) siblings.
scheduled_data_update: minimum-wage step on 1 January 2028 ($16.00 → $18.00). Calendar reminder for December 2027 to verify and update page.
compliance_cache_written: sprint/compliance-cache/hawaii.json (referenced; wage-side facts cross-checked against statute and DLIR)
